scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/ink-web test && bun run --cwd packages/ink-ui test && bun run --cwd packages/ink-testing test
scripts.test:ci: bun run --cwd packages/ink-web test --randomize --rerun-each 5 && bun run --cwd packages/ink-ui test --randomize --rerun-each 5 && bun run --cwd packages/ink-testing test --randomize --rerun-each 5
scripts.tsc: bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/ink-web && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/ink-ui && bunx tsc --noEmit -p docs
scripts.docs:build: bun run build && bun run --cwd docs build
scripts.publish: cp README.md packages/ink-web/README.md && npm publish --workspace packages/ink-web
